text: 🏆 Our team LLM-INSTRUCT won 1st place (Champion) at the UZH Shared Task 2026 (ArgMining Workshop, ACL 2026).
New first-author manuscript SCoRe: Smoothed Certified Release for Prompt Repair submitted to NeurIPS 2026 (CORE A*).
Two first-author journal manuscripts under review at JAIR and LRE (Q1) on risk-controlled RAG fact-checking and claim decomposition.
🥉 Awarded a Bronze Medal at the Vietnam Olympiad of Artificial Intelligence (VOAI 2025).
